senses.definition: to have a very successful outcome, often despite initial challenges or difficulties

examples.x: After a challenging year, things finally came up roses for the athlete, who won several major competitions and broke records.
Despite some setbacks, everything is coming up roses for the business, with increased sales and positive customer feedback.

senses.definition: to take time to recover, heal, or regain strength after a difficult or painful experience

examples.x: After the breakup, she spent several weeks licking her wounds and reflecting on the relationship before moving on.
If the proposal is rejected, we'll need to lick our wounds, gather feedback, and make improvements before submitting again.

senses.definition: a sudden and significant change, improvement, or increase

examples.x: The development of self-driving cars acts as a quantum jump in transportation, with the potential to reduce traffic and improve safety on the roads.
The discovery of new planets represents a quantum leap in astronomy, with the potential to deepen our understanding of the universe and our place in it.

senses.definition: to make effort to fix all the small problems of something, such as an activity or project

examples.x: After some initial setbacks, we were able to iron out the kinks in the project and complete it on time.

senses.definition: slowly becoming successful again after a period of constant failure
gaining more popularity, power, or influence

examples.x: The popularity of electric vehicles has remained in the ascendant.
The use of social media in marketing is in the ascendant.

senses.definition: in a state of moving or progressing rapidly, particularly with regards to one's career, success, or lifestyle

examples.x: After her big promotion, she found herself in the fast lane of corporate success.
Their startup is growing rapidly, putting them in the fast lane of the tech industry.
Ever since winning the championship, his career has been in the fast lane.
After her big promotion, she found herself in the fast lane of corporate success.

senses.definition: returning to the right path after a failure, mistake, etc.

examples.x: After a period of illness, she was finally back on track and able to return to work.
The company was struggling, but a new CEO was able to get things back on track.

senses.definition: in a process of recovering or improving from a failure or setback

examples.x: After a series of setbacks and missteps, the team regrouped and found themselves on the mend, with a renewed sense of purpose and a clear plan for moving forward.
Despite the recent financial setback, the company is on the mend and making significant progress towards regaining stability.
With the help of a therapist, the couple is on the mend and is working through the challenges in their relationship.

senses.definition: something that completes or enhances an already fine piece of work

examples.x: The artist put the finishing stroke on the painting by adding a small detail that brought the whole piece together.
The dessert was delicious, but it needed a finishing touch to make it truly special.

senses.definition: something extra that is added to something that is already good in order to make it perfect

examples.x: My day was already going well, but when I found out I got the promotion, it was like icing on the cake.
The dinner was delicious, but the icing on the cake was when the chef sent out a complimentary dessert.
The party was fun, but when my favorite song came on, it was like the frosting on the cake.

word_list.pronunciation: ðə tʃˈɛɹi ˌɑːn tˈɑːp ʌv ðə kˈeɪk sˈʌndeɪ

senses.definition: the final adjustment to something already good or satisfactory just to make it perfect

examples.x: After a long day of work, coming home to a hot meal prepared by my spouse was great, and the fact that they had also picked up my favorite dessert was the cherry on top of the sundae.
The book was already enjoyable, but the twist ending was like the cherry on the cake.
The meal was delicious, but the complimentary dessert was the cherry on the sundae.
The wedding was already beautiful, but the cherry on top of the cake was when the couple surprised everyone by arriving on horseback.
